title: Configure NATS for Production: 3-Node Cluster with JetStream Persistence
subtasks: Update the NATS deployment (messaging/nats) to run as a 3-node cluster for high availability.
Enable JetStream persistence for message durability; configure a persistent volume claim for JetStream storage.
Set cluster and JetStream configuration in the NATS Helm values or manifests: cluster.name, cluster.replicas=3, jetstream.enabled=true.
Configure NATS service to expose the cluster to in-cluster clients only (no external access unless required).
Test failover by killing a pod and verifying cluster continuity and message durability.

title: Configure TLS Certificates via cert-manager for Ingress
subtasks: Install cert-manager in the cluster if not already present.
Create a ClusterIssuer or Issuer for Let's Encrypt (or internal CA if required by org policy).
Annotate the Ingress resource for cto-pm (and dashboard if exposed) with cert-manager.io/cluster-issuer.
Ensure Ingress resources reference the correct TLS secret and hostnames.
Verify certificate issuance and renewal by checking the Certificate and Secret resources.

title: Configure Ingress Controller (NGINX) for Production
subtasks: Ensure NGINX Ingress controller is deployed and up-to-date in the cluster.
Create or update Ingress resources for cto-pm and dashboard (if exposed), referencing the correct service and port.
Add rate limiting annotations (e.g., nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rate-limit: 100, nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rate-limit-window: 1m).
Restrict Ingress to required hostnames and paths only.
Test external access via Ingress and verify correct routing and TLS termination.

title: Configure Cloudflare CDN for Static Asset Caching
subtasks: If the dashboard is exposed externally, configure Cloudflare as the CDN in front of the Ingress.
Set up DNS for the dashboard/cto-pm hostnames to point to Cloudflare.
Configure Cloudflare Page Rules or Cache Rules to cache static assets (/_next/static/*, /static/*, /favicon.ico) with long TTL.
Ensure API routes and dynamic endpoints are not cached (Cache-Control: no-store).
Test asset caching and cache invalidation on deploy.

title: Apply Network Policies to Restrict Pod-to-Pod Traffic in sigma-1
subtasks: Apply a default-deny NetworkPolicy for both ingress and egress in the sigma-1 namespace.
Create explicit allow rules for ingress to cto-pm from the Ingress controller on port 3000.
Create egress allow rules for cto-pm to bots/discord-bridge-http, bots/linear-bridge, and Hermes (in-cluster), and to external APIs (Linear, GitHub, NOUS) on port 443.
Allow DNS egress for all pods in sigma-1.
Test enforcement by verifying allowed and denied connections from test pods.

title: Configure OpenTelemetry Collector and Jaeger for Production Observability
subtasks: Deploy or update the OpenTelemetry Collector with production sampling rates (e.g., 1-10% for traces, 100% for errors).
Configure the collector to export traces to Jaeger with persistent storage (e.g., PVC-backed Elasticsearch or Cassandra).
Update cto-pm and other services to export traces to the collector endpoint.
Set up Jaeger retention policy and storage class for durability.
Test trace collection and persistence by generating sample traffic and verifying traces in Jaeger.

title: Define Alert Rules for SLO Violations
subtasks: Define Prometheus alert rules for key SLOs: API error rate, latency, pod restarts, and resource saturation.
Configure alertmanager to route alerts to the appropriate channel (e.g., Discord bridge or email).
Test alert firing by simulating SLO violations (e.g., inject errors, CPU/memory pressure).
Document alert runbooks and escalation paths.
